channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukraine launches major drone attack as Russia strikes back
item.description: Ukraine conducted a significant nighttime assault on a dozen Russian regions, occupied Crimea, and surrounding waters, while Russia attacked various areas.

item.title: Palestinians mourn father-to-be killed by Israeli forces on day of son's birth
item.description: Nayef Samaro, 25, died during an Israeli military raid in Nablus, occupied West Bank, as he prepared to meet his wife at the hospital for the delivery.

item.title: Aircraft collides with Beijing's tallest building, causing damage
item.description: The cause of the damage could not be independently confirmed, and officials did not immediately comment on the incident.

item.title: U.S. pledges generous earthquake relief to Venezuela
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio promised: "We have a whole-of-government response. It'll be big; it'll be fast; and it'll be effective."
